query: SELECT userId, deviceId, COUNT(*) as count FROM players WHERE userId IS NOT NULL OR deviceId IS NOT NULL GROUP BY userId, deviceId HAVING count > 1 LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user p1iERkZxRv8XeMu.root --database EorxrxCPNFVtGo7gjBVrJr --execute SELECT userId, deviceId, COUNT(*) as count FROM players WHERE userId IS NOT NULL OR deviceId IS NOT NULL GROUP BY userId, deviceId HAVING count > 1 LIMIT 20;
